bundledArtifacts.source: scripts/build-release-assets.mjs using WSL Ubuntu static busybox

windowsInstaller.userVisibleInstallNote: Windows may show an unknown publisher warning. Verify the SHA256 file from the GitHub Release before installing.

wsl_disabled.recoverySummary: Prompt the user to enable WSL2, then rerun precheck and install.

reboot_interrupted.recoverySummary: Reopen the installer after reboot and follow the guided resume or reinstall path.

startup_failure.recoverySummary: Use retry, rebuild, or delete and reinstall based on the recovery guidance.

exceptionValidation.triggerMethod: Started the production bridge with a controlled elevation helper that exits 1223, matching Windows UAC user-cancel behavior, then ran request_permission.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Ask the user to rerun the permission step and approve the Windows administrator prompt.
exceptionValidation.actualRecoveryResult: Operation failed quickly, final status stayed failed, and installation state remained unchanged.

exceptionValidation.userVisibleMessage: Not validated in this live lifecycle run.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Run the dedicated exception validation case on a controlled Windows machine.

exceptionValidation.userVisibleMessage: Not validated in this live lifecycle run.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Run the dedicated exception validation case on a controlled Windows machine.

exceptionValidation.triggerMethod: Started the production bridge with AGENT_SECURITY_BUNDLED_AGENT_PATH pointing to a missing release asset.
exceptionValidation.userVisibleMessage: Bundled agent artifact is required outside dev mode.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Restore the exact bundled release package and rerun the installer.
exceptionValidation.actualRecoveryResult: Bridge failed before install work began; restoring the bundled artifact let health check pass.

exceptionValidation.triggerMethod: Started the production bridge with a modified bundled agent package while keeping the frozen manifest SHA256.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Replace the corrupted package with the exact release asset and rerun install.
exceptionValidation.actualRecoveryResult: Installer stopped at checksum verification and did not continue to agent install.

exceptionValidation.userVisibleMessage: Not validated in this live lifecycle run.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Run the dedicated exception validation case on a controlled Windows machine.

exceptionValidation.triggerMethod: Installed the dedicated AgentSecurity distro, created a protected Windows-side residue under its install directory, then ran delete_environment.
exceptionValidation.recommendedRecovery: Report the remaining path to the user, remove the blocked residue after permission is fixed, then verify the distro is gone.
exceptionValidation.actualRecoveryResult: Delete did not report success while residue remained; removing the protected residue cleared the remaining install directory.
